raw_consumer_statement:
I tried to return some items to the store. But the store would not accept the return citing a 30 day return policy. I emailed corporate and they confirmed that the items I purchased had a 90 day return policy ( see attachment ). I went to the store to confirm but they still would not take the return saying their system shows 30 day returns. 

I sent this to my credit card to dispute. For some reason, Citi only confirms whether or not the item was purchased. They never investigate return policies. Once Citi confirms the item was purchased, they will deny the dispute regardless if you tried in good faith to return the items ( even if new and unused ).
